Search results for "browser automation"

  • Playwright - Fast and reliable end-to-end testing

    Cross-browser automation library for end-to-end testing. Supports Chromium, Firefox and WebKit.

    playwright.dev

  • Puppeteer - Headless Chrome Node.js API

    Control Chrome or Chromium over the DevTools Protocol. Great for automation and testing.

    pptr.dev

  • Selenium - Browser Automation Framework

    The standard for cross-browser testing and automation. Supports multiple languages.

    selenium.dev

  • Cypress - JavaScript Testing Framework

    Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

    cypress.io

  • aibrowsr - Browser automation for AI agents

    Single Rust binary, zero runtime deps. Talks CDP directly to Chrome.

    github.com
